35.reason: Missing else clause: when '-' appears but does not satisfy any expansion condition, the '-' itself should be copied to z. Currently it is omitted, causing output like "Be" instead of "B-e".

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Missing else clause: when '-' appears but does not satisfy any expansion condition, the '-' itself should be copied to z. Currently it is omitted, causing output like "Be" instead of "B-e".
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing else clause: When s[i]=='-' but the characters around it are not of the same type or s[i-1] >= s[i+1], the '-' character is not copied to output, causing it to be omitted.]
